summary: Hydrated state shows no security-sensitive items. #54374 remains the best open coordination/canonical PR for the WebChat pre-tool cumulative-stream duplication family, but it is not merge-ready: ClawSweeper asks for maintainer review, the implementation path is still a design choice between gateway segment-boundary state and Control UI suffix/offset handling, no clean current /review preflight is present, and relevant checks are not clean. No close, merge, label, or fix-PR action is safe to plan in this pass.
